Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class SecuritySettings

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.MetadataForSettings
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.SecuritySettings
public class SecuritySettings extends MetadataForSettings

Java class for SecuritySettings complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="SecuritySettings">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}MetadataForSettings">
       <sequence>
         <element name="canUsersGrantLoginAccess" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableAdminLoginAsAnyUser" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableAuditFieldsInactiveOwner" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableAuraSecureEvalPref" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableCoepHeader" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableCoopHeader" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableRequireHttpsConnection" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="networkAccess" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}NetworkAccess" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="passwordPolicies" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}PasswordPolicies" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="redirectBlockModeEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="sessionSettings" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}SessionSettings" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="singleSignOnSettings" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}SingleSignOnSettings" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
